# Phase-10 — Security, Identity & Compliance

> Secure data and AI platforms with zero-trust identity and compliance by design.
>
> Suggested timeline: **Weeks 38-40**

Each prompt below instructs GitHub Copilot to generate exactly one standalone Markdown
chapter with all 50 mandatory sections (Azure-primary, ~60/30/10 Azure/OSS/AWS+GCP).

| # | Prompt | Generates | Study time |
|---|--------|-----------|------------|
| 01 | [Security Foundations](01_Security_Foundations.prompt.md) | `Security_Foundations.md` | 60 min + 3h |
| 02 | [Identity and Access Management with Entra](02_Identity_and_Access_Management_with_Entra.prompt.md) | `Identity_and_Access_Management.md` | 75 min + 5h |
| 03 | [Data Security and Encryption](03_Data_Security_and_Encryption.prompt.md) | `Data_Security_and_Encryption.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 04 | [Network Security and Zero Trust](04_Network_Security_and_Zero_Trust.prompt.md) | `Network_Security_Zero_Trust.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 05 | [Secrets and Key Management](05_Secrets_and_Key_Management.prompt.md) | `Secrets_and_Key_Management.md` | 45 min + 3h |
| 06 | [Compliance and Regulatory Frameworks](06_Compliance_and_Regulatory_Frameworks.prompt.md) | `Compliance_and_Regulatory.md` | 45 min + 2h |
| 07 | [Data Privacy and PII Protection](07_Data_Privacy_and_PII_Protection.prompt.md) | `Data_Privacy_and_PII.md` | 60 min + 3h |

## How to run
Open a prompt file in VS Code and run it with GitHub Copilot (agent mode), or reference it
from Copilot Chat. It will produce the corresponding `.md` chapter listed above.
